Package com.ibm.cloud.continuous_delivery.cd_tekton_pipeline.v2.model

    CreateTektonPipelineTriggerOptions.Events
    List of events.

    CreateTektonPipelineTriggerPropertiesOptions.Type
    Property type.
    GenericSecret.Algorithm
    Algorithm used for `digest_matches` secret type.
    GenericSecret.Source
    Secret location, not needed if secret type is `internal_validation`.
    GenericSecret.Type
    Secret type.
    GetTektonPipelineRunOptions.Includes
    Defines if response includes definition metadata.
    ListTektonPipelinePropertiesOptions.Type
    Type of property.
    ListTektonPipelineRunsOptions.Status
    Filters the collection to resources with the specified status.

    Status of the pipeline run.
    PipelineRunsCollectionPipelineRunsItem.Status
    Status of the pipeline run.

    The cancelTektonPipelineRun options.

    Definition
    Tekton pipeline definition entry object, consisting of a repository url, a repository path and a branch or tag.
    DefinitionsCollection
    Pipeline definitions is a collection of individual definition entries, each entry consists of a repository URL, a repository path, and a branch or tag.
    DefinitionsCollectionDefinitionsItem
    Tekton pipeline definition entry object, consisting of a repository url, a repository path and a branch or tag.
    DefinitionSource
    Source repository containing the Tekton pipeline definition.
    DefinitionSource.Builder
    Builder.
    DefinitionSourceProperties
    Properties of the source, which define the URL of the repository and a branch or tag.
    DefinitionSourceProperties.Builder
    Builder.
    DefinitionSourcePropertiesTool
    Reference to the repository tool, in the parent toolchain, that contains the pipeline definition.
    DefinitionSourcePropertiesTool.Builder
    Builder.

    The deleteTektonPipelineDefinition options.
    DeleteTektonPipelineDefinitionOptions.Builder
    Builder.

    Builder.

    ListTektonPipelineTriggersOptions.Builder
    Builder.
    Log
    Log data for Tekton pipeline run steps.
    LogsCollection
    List of pipeline run log objects.
    PipelineRun
    Single Tekton pipeline run object.
    PipelineRunsCollection
    Tekton pipeline runs object.
    PipelineRunsCollectionFirst
    First page of pipeline runs.
    PipelineRunsCollectionLast
    Last page of pipeline runs relative to the `start` and `limit` params.
    PipelineRunsCollectionNext
    Next page of pipeline runs relative to the `start` and `limit` params.
    PipelineRunsCollectionPipelineRunsItem
    Single Tekton pipeline run object.
    PipelineRunTrigger
    Trigger details passed when triggering a Tekton pipeline run.
    PipelineRunTrigger.Builder
    Builder.
    PipelineRunWorker
    Worker details used in this pipeline run.
    PropertiesCollection
    Pipeline properties object.
    Property
    Property object.
    Property.Builder
    Builder.
    ReplaceTektonPipelineDefinitionOptions
    The replaceTektonPipelineDefinition options.
    ReplaceTektonPipelineDefinitionOptions.Builder
    Builder.
    ReplaceTektonPipelinePropertyOptions
    The replaceTektonPipelineProperty options.
    ReplaceTektonPipelinePropertyOptions.Builder
    Builder.
    ReplaceTektonPipelineTriggerPropertyOptions
    The replaceTektonPipelineTriggerProperty options.
    ReplaceTektonPipelineTriggerPropertyOptions.Builder
    Builder.
    RerunTektonPipelineRunOptions
    The rerunTektonPipelineRun options.
    RerunTektonPipelineRunOptions.Builder
    Builder.
    ResourceGroupReference
    The resource group in which the pipeline was created.
    RunDefinition
    Reference to the pipeline definition of a pipeline run.
    RunPipeline
    Reference to the pipeline to which a pipeline run belongs.
    RunsFirstPage
    First page of pipeline runs.
    RunsLastPage
    Last page of pipeline runs relative to the `start` and `limit` params.
    RunsNextPage
    Next page of pipeline runs relative to the `start` and `limit` params.
    StepLog
    Logs for a Tekton pipeline run step.
    TektonPipeline
    Tekton pipeline object.
    TektonPipelinePatch
    Request body used to update this pipeline.
    TektonPipelinePatch.Builder
    Builder.
    TektonPipelineResourceGroup
    The ID of the resource group in which the pipeline was created.
    TektonPipelineRunsPager
    TektonPipelineRunsPager can be used to simplify the use of the "listTektonPipelineRuns" method.
    Tool
    Reference to the repository tool in the parent toolchain.
    Tool.Builder
    Builder.
    ToolchainReference
    Toolchain object containing references to the parent toolchain.
    Trigger
    Tekton pipeline trigger.
    TriggerGenericTrigger
    Generic webhook trigger, which triggers a pipeline run when the Tekton Pipeline Service receives a POST event with secrets.
    TriggerGenericTriggerPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerManualTrigger
    Manual trigger.
    TriggerManualTriggerPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerPatch
    Tekton pipeline trigger object used for updating the trigger.
    TriggerPatch.Builder
    Builder.
    TriggerPropertiesCollection
    Trigger properties object.
    TriggerPropertiesCollectionPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerProperty
    Trigger property object.
    TriggerScmTrigger
    Git trigger type.
    TriggerScmTriggerPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    TriggersCollection
    Tekton pipeline triggers object.
    TriggerSource
    Source repository for a Git trigger.
    TriggerSourceProperties
    Properties of the source, which define the URL of the repository and a branch or pattern.
    TriggerSourcePropertiesPrototype
    Properties of the source, which define the URL of the repository and a branch or pattern.
    TriggerSourcePropertiesPrototype.Builder
    Builder.
    TriggerSourcePropertiesTool
    Reference to the repository tool in the parent toolchain.
    TriggerSourcePropertiesTool.Builder
    Builder.
    TriggerSourcePrototype
    Source repository for a Git trigger.
    TriggerSourcePrototype.Builder
    Builder.
    TriggerTimerTrigger
    Timer trigger, which triggers pipeline runs according to the provided CRON value and timezone.
    TriggerTimerTriggerPropertiesItem
    Trigger property object.
    UpdateTektonPipelineOptions
    The updateTektonPipeline options.
    UpdateTektonPipelineOptions.Builder
    Builder.
    UpdateTektonPipelineTriggerOptions
    The updateTektonPipelineTrigger options.
    UpdateTektonPipelineTriggerOptions.Builder
    Builder.
    UserInfo
    Information about the user that triggered a pipeline run.
    Worker
    Details of the worker used to run the pipeline.
    WorkerIdentity
    Specify the worker that is to be used to run the trigger, indicated by a worker object with only the worker ID.
    WorkerIdentity.Builder
    Builder.
